entries.content:
Shatadal Sundar Sinha
SENIOR FRONT-END DEVELOPER • REACT.JS • NEXT.JS • ANGULAR • TYPESCRIPT • NODE.JS
Email: shatadal17@gmail.com | Phone: +91 70636 44658, +91 93824 68250 | Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior Front-End Developer with 4+ years of experience building high-performance web applications across SaaS,
EdTech, and PropTech domains. Specialises in React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript on the front end, with additional
experience in Angular for component-driven UI development. Recently expanded into backend development with
Node.js and EJS, leveraging AI-assisted tooling to accelerate delivery. Proven track record in leading product
development and designing REST API integrations, consistently delivering clean, scalable solutions in
cross-functional teams.
WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Front-End Developer
Webskitters Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd. — Kolkata, India | Aug 2024 – Present
WebSkitters Academy – Student CRM Portal (In-house Product Front-End Lead)
l Led front-end development from scratch, owning architecture and delivery across the full product lifecycle.
l Built a scalable component system using Next.js, TypeScript, and Material UI actively serving hundreds of students
and admins.
l Converted Figma wireframes into pixel-perfect, fully responsive pages with zero design debt.
l Collaborated with back-end engineers on REST API integration, defining consistent data-flow and error-handling
patterns.
l Achieved sub-2s LCP on key pages, directly improving user retention metrics.
Qpulse AI-Powered Resume Builder (Client Project — USA)
l Built an AI-driven resume builder and admin dashboard using Next.js and TypeScript with multiple AI model backends.
l Developed personalised career roadmap features and a real-time AI chatbot for an end-to-end interactive experience.
l Used Antigravity AI to build Node.js and EJS-based backend routes for data persistence and user session
management, expanding hands-on backend exposure.
Front-End Developer
Ebrotech Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. — Kolkata, India | Jun 2023 – Aug 2024
Tenant Management System
l Designed and built the full UI for a web and mobile rent management app covering tenant records, rent tracking, and
landlord dashboards using React.js and Ant Design.
l Consumed MongoDB-backed REST APIs for real-time data sync; maintained 99% uptime through thorough end-to-end
testing.
Visitor Management Platform
l Built a type-safe visitor scheduling system with React.js and TypeScript; strict typing and validation reduced runtime
bugs by ~40%.
l Worked closely with backend engineers on Node.js and EJS-based admin views, aligning front-end data needs with
server-rendered routes.
Entra Office App
l Built a feature-rich office management application covering meeting room bookings, visitor tracking, staff management,
and expense reporting.

-- 1 of 2 --

l Worked on select Angular-based modules for internal dashboard views, gaining hands-on experience with Angular
components and services.
Front-End Developer
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. — Kolkata, India | Jul 2022 – May 2023
l Doctor Appointment System: Delivered a responsive doctor availability and booking platform using React.js, Bootstrap,
and Tailwind CSS.
l School Management System: Contributed to a centralised school operations platform using HTML5, CSS3, and
JavaScript, with Node.js and MongoDB powering the backend (built by the backend team).
Front-End Developer Intern
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. — Kolkata, India | Sep 2021 – Feb 2022
l Built the front-end of a full-featured e-commerce platform — product listings, shopping cart, authentication, and
payment integration — using React.js, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
l Observed Node.js/Express backend patterns and MongoDB data modelling while collaborating with the backend team.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Front-End React.js, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3
Back-End
(AI-tool-assisted, recent)
Node.js, EJS, REST API Design & Integration
Database (working
exposure)
MongoDB, Mongoose
State Management Redux, Context API, React Query
UI Libraries Material UI (MUI), Ant Design, Tailwind CSS, SCSS/SASS, Bootstrap
Payment Gateways Razorpay, Cashfree, Instamojo
Tools & Workflow Git/GitHub, VS Code, Figma, Performance Optimisation, Agile / Scrum
Soft Skills Front-End Leadership, Cross-functional Collaboration, Clean Code Practices
AI-assisted development tools: Claude AI, Amazon Q, GLM AI, Antigravity AI (used for Node.js/EJS backend development)
EDUCATION
B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering
Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT) | 2018 – 2022 | CGPA: 8.57/10

-- 2 of 2 --
